name: Welcome
subject: Welcome to AI HQ — Your Command Centre is Ready
body:
Welcome to AI HQ

You've just unlocked the most powerful AI operations platform available.

AI HQ gives you a unified command centre to orchestrate autonomous agents, monitor real-time intelligence, and drive revenue — all from a single dashboard.

Here's what happens next:

  • Your dashboard is live. Log in now to explore your workspace.
  • Agents are standing by. Your fleet is ready to deploy on your first task.
  • Support is included. Reply to this email anytime — a real human will respond.

Open Your Dashboard →

Welcome aboard.
The AI HQ Team

name: Feature Tour
subject: 5 Things You Can Do with AI HQ Today
body:
Get More From AI HQ

Most users only scratch the surface. Here are five capabilities you can put to work right now:

  1. Agent Fleet Management — Deploy, monitor, and coordinate autonomous agents from one screen. No context-switching.
  2. Real-Time Market Intelligence — Track competitors, trending topics, and opportunities as they emerge.
  3. Automated Outreach — Draft and send campaigns across email and social channels without manual effort.
  4. Revenue Analytics — See exactly where your pipeline stands and where to focus next.
  5. Consciousness Stream — Our proprietary self-improving agent layer that gets smarter with every interaction.

Each of these is available in your dashboard now — no setup required.

Explore Features →

Build something great.
The AI HQ Team

name: Conversion
subject: Your Free Trial Ends Soon — Lock In Your Rate
body:
Don't Lose Access

Your trial period is ending soon. Here's what upgrading gets you:

  • Unlimited agent deployments — no caps on your fleet size.
  • Priority processing — your tasks run first, every time.
  • Advanced analytics — full revenue tracking, market intelligence, and performance dashboards.
  • Dedicated support — direct access to our team for onboarding and strategy.

Early adopters who upgrade this week lock in our launch pricing — 50% off the standard rate, guaranteed for life.

Upgrade Now — 50% Off →

This pricing won't last. Secure your spot today.

— The AI HQ Team
